content.problemStatement: Chef has a sequence A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​. He needs to find the number of pairs (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) (1≤i<j≤N1 \le i \lt j \le N1≤i<j≤N) such that Ai+Aj=Ai⋅AjA_i + A_j = A_i \cdot A_jAi​+Aj​=Ai​⋅Aj​. However, he is busy, so he asks for your help.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains a single integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,…,ANA_1, A_2, \ldots, A_NA1​,A2​,…,AN​.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ― the desired number of pairs.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
Example case 1: The only valid pair is (1,3)(1, 3)(1,3).
Example case 2: We can see that no valid pair exists.
